Flow.description:
This Screen Flow is designed for use in a Salesforce Community, allowing employees to securely submit and manage their payment detail records.
ALN-533 - Removed the condition for Namespace in "Get new BSB" Component

formulas.name: frmCurrentBankAccount
formulas.expression: "BSB: " & {!Loop_Payment_Details.tc9_pr__Bank_Account_Branch_Code__c} & " Account: ****" & RIGHT ( {!Loop_Payment_Details.tc9_pr__Bank_Account_Number__c} , 4 ) & " " & TEXT ( {!Loop_Payment_Details.tc9_pr__Distribution_Type__c} ) & If ( TEXT ( {!Loop_Payment_Details.tc9_pr__Distribution_Type__c} ) = "Fixed Amount" , ": $" & TEXT ( {!Loop_Payment_Details.tc9_pr__Fixed_Amount__c} ) , If ( TEXT ( {!Loop_Payment_Details.tc9_pr__Distribution_Type__c} ) = "Percentage" , ": " & TEXT ( {!Loop_Payment_Details.tc9_pr__Percentage__c} * 100 ) & "%" , null ) ) & " " & "(Effective Date: " & TEXT({!Loop_Payment_Details.tc9_pr__Effective_Date__c}) & ")"

formulas.name: frmEffectiveDate
formulas.expression: If ( ISBLANK ( {!Get_Last_PPB.Id} ) , TODAY() , IF ( AND ( NOT ( ISBLANK ( {!Get_Last_PPB.Id} ) ) , {!Get_Last_PPB.tc9_pr__Pay_Batch__r.tc9_pr__Payment_Date__c} < TODAY() ) , TODAY(), {!Get_Last_PPB.tc9_pr__Pay_Batch__r.tc9_pr__Payment_Date__c} + 1 ) )

formulas.name: frmStatus
formulas.expression: If ( TEXT ( {!Loop_Payment_Details.tc9_pr__Status__c} ) = 'On Hold' , 'On Hold' , If ( {!Loop_Payment_Details.tc9_pr__Effective_Date__c} >= {!$Flow.CurrentDate} , 'On Hold' , 'Inactive' ) )

Flow.label: 2c9 Utilities - Community Capture Bank Details

value.stringValue: [{"apiName":"tc9_pr__Bank_Account_Name__c","guid":"column-e5bb","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Account Name","wrapText":true,"order":0,"label":"Bank Account Name","type":"text"},{"apiName":"tc9_pr__Bank_Account_Branch_Code__c","guid":"column-d06f","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"BSB","wrapText":true,"order":1,"label":"Bank Account Branch Code","type":"text"},{"apiName":"Bank_Account_Number_Masked__c","guid":"column-0b31","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Account Number","wrapText":true,"order":2,"label":"Bank Account Number Masked","type":"customRichText"},{"apiName":"tc9_pr__Effective_Date__c","guid":"column-40f8","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":3,"label":"Effective Date","type":"date"},{"apiName":"tc9_pr__Distribution_Type__c","guid":"column-c3b7","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":4,"label":"Distribution Type","type":"text"},{"apiName":"tc9_pr__Fixed_Amount__c","guid":"column-4c44","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":5,"label":"Fixed Amount","type":"number"}]

fields.name: displayMaximum
fields.fieldText: You can split your pay across up to {!Get_Payment_Entity.tc9_pr__Maximum_Payment_Distributions__c} different bank accounts.

fields.name: inputHowManyAccounts
fields.fieldText: How many bank accounts do you want us to deposit your pay into?

fields.name: displayBSBError
fields.fieldText: The BSB you entered could not be found: {!frmWrongBSB}

fields.name: displayEffectiveDate
fields.fieldText: These payment details will become effective on {!frmEffectiveDate}

validationRule.errorMessage: Please only enter numbers and ensure your account number is no longer than 9 digits.
validationRule.formulaExpression: AND ( ISNUMBER ( {!inputAccount_Number} ) , LEN ( {!inputAccount_Number} ) > 1 , LEN ( {!inputAccount_Number} ) < 10 , NOT ( CONTAINS ( {!inputAccount_Number} , "." ) ) )

validationRule.errorMessage: You have entered invalid characters. A-Z, a-z, 0-9 and +-,. are allowed.
The fixed amount must be greater than zero.
The percentage must be greater than 0 and less than 100

fields.name: displayFault
fields.fieldText:
The following errors were encountered when trying to change your bank account details. Please contact payroll.


{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: textNoAccounts
fields.fieldText:
You currently have no Active Payment Details.

Add your first payment account.

fields.name: displaySuccess
fields.fieldText: Success! Your bank details have been updated successfully and will be Active from {!frmEffectiveDate}.

fields.name: txtNoPayee
fields.fieldText:
No Active Payee record found for this user record.

Please contact your payroll department.
